{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321223957926C4AB596B6CE2B341B"}"},"total":1004},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589848718814397209","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整体是本好书，背景参考永乐年间，最让我觉得惊艳的是，老二老三两个王爷，夺嫡过程中浪子回头，跟着主角哥仨一起做生意，算上太子和皇上，爷五个一起发展国家，真正五龙同朝的感觉，很棒的设计。而且结局大圆满也是个人喜欢的。生活很苦了，小说世界还是圆满的好~
不过槽点也有不少，比如最后征服满刺加海峡那里，拖拖踏踏，完全没展现出军事霸主的感觉。不过瑕不掩瑜，整体值得五星~期待下一部作品~","text_exts":[{"e":44,"s":40,"text":"浪子回头","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B5%AA%E5%AD%90%E5%9B%9E%E5%A4%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774103997CE2B341B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227589848718814397209%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227427893923520973849%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%AA%E5%AD%90%E5%9B%9E%E5%A4%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767153386,"group_id":"7427893923520973849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxyCg2t9CUo8o+hOJQPT4WU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"103795675884","user_name":"喜欢刺儿棵的杨社"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103795675884","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427893923520973849","book_info":{"abstract":"【种田】+【轻松】+【架空】+【无系统】+【人设鲜明】
穿越到楚国的许闲公子，是一名实至名归的纨绔。
他煽动国公府公子逃学，他去教坊司竟往回拿钱。
他对朝廷权臣拳打脚踢，他对京中权贵刀剑相向。
他在抑商律下大肆经商，他将京师扰的鸡犬不宁。
......
许闲声色犬马不学无术，恶贯满盈罄竹难书。
朝中许多人对许闲恨得咬牙切齿，痛心疾首。
皇帝面前的御案上每日放满了参许闲的奏折。
面对史官的当面采访。
许闲淡然道：我姐夫是太子，我纨绔点怎么了？
太子淡然道：许闲是孤小舅子，纨绔点怎么了？
皇帝淡然道：许闲是朕心头肉，纨绔点怎么了？
文武百官：？？？
